summary: Comprehensive test suite covering all major functionality (classification, output formats, exit codes, argument validation) with good organization using bats framework and deterministic testing via fixed reference dates. Main gaps: no tests for malformed JSON structures, invalid date formats, date boundary conditions (leap years, year/month boundaries), extreme values, or special characters. Would catch regressions in core logic but might miss edge case bugs. Test fixtures are referenced but not documented in the provided code, creating a dependency on external assumptions about fixture content.
